title: Figure 2.9 Convolution of x(t) and g(t).
summary: This page consists primarily of Figure 2.9, which graphically illustrates the convolution of x(t) and g(t). The subfigures show x(t), g(t), the flipped signal g(-τ), shifted versions g(t-τ) for t ≥ 0 and t < 0, and the resulting output c(t).

figures.caption: Convolution of x(t) and g(t), including subplots (a) through (f)
